WHEN dg.table_name = 'model_SUNGROW_SG6250HV_MV_V1' AND d.field_value_default = 'AC_Active_Power' THEN (IF(d.field_value1 = -1 or d.field_value1 IS NULL, "-", CONCAT_WS(" ", FORMAT(ROUND(d.field_value1, 2),2), "kW" ))) WHEN dg.table_name = 'model_GE_Multilin_EPM_6000' AND d.field_value_default = 'HI_WIND_Active_Power' THEN (IF(d.field_value1 = -1 or d.field_value1 IS NULL, "-", CONCAT_WS(" ", FORMAT(ROUND(d.field_value1, 2),2), "kW" ))) WHEN dg.table_name = 'model_InaccessPPCV2' AND d.field_value_default = 'AI_Power_Factor_Feedback' THEN (IF(d.field_value1 = -1 or d.field_value1 IS NULL, "-", CONCAT_WS(" ", FORMAT(ROUND(d.field_value1, 2),2), "" )))
WHEN dg.table_name = 'model_PVH_Master' AND d.field_value_default = 'Globalsuntrackingsetpoint' THEN (IF(d.field_value1 = -1 or d.field_value1 IS NULL, "-", CONCAT_WS(" ", FORMAT(ROUND(d.field_value1, 2),2), "Degrees" ))) WHEN dg.table_name = 'model_Atonometrics_MT2_BOM_Sensor' AND d.field_value_default = 'ModuleTemperature' THEN (IF(d.field_value1 = -1 or d.field_value1 IS NULL, "-", CONCAT_WS(" ", FORMAT(ROUND(d.field_value1, 2),2), "Degrees" ))) WHEN dg.table_name = 'model_PVH_Tbox' AND d.field_value_default = 'OperationMode' THEN (IF(d.field_value1 = -1 or d.field_value1 IS NULL, "-", CONCAT_WS(" ", FORMAT(ROUND(d.field_value1, 2),2), "" ))) WHEN dg.table_name = 'model_ATI_Tracker_Motor' AND d.field_value_default = 'SetpointPosition' THEN (IF(d.field_value1 = -1 or d.field_value1 IS NULL, "-", CONCAT_WS(" ", FORMAT(ROUND(d.field_value1, 2),2), "Degrees " ))) WHEN dg.table_name = 'model_ADAM6050_Transformer_Specific' AND d.field_value_default = 'Vacuum' THEN (IF(d.field_value1 = -1 or d.field_value1 IS NULL, "-", CONCAT_WS(" ", FORMAT(ROUND(d.field_value1, 2),2), "" )))
WHEN dg.table_name = 'model_LevitonS4100KPowerMeter' AND d.field_value_default = 'TotalNetInstantaneousRealPower' THEN (IF(d.field_value1 = -1 or d.field_value1 IS NULL, "-", CONCAT_WS(" ", FORMAT(ROUND(d.field_value1, 2),2), "kW" ))) WHEN dg.table_name = 'model_Solis_Smartlog_INV' AND d.field_value_default = 'Activepower' THEN (IF(d.field_value1 = -1 or d.field_value1 IS NULL, "-", CONCAT_WS(" ", FORMAT(ROUND(d.field_value1, 2),2), "kW" )))
WHEN dg.table_name = 'model_Kipp_Zonen_CMP214Point' AND d.field_value_default = 'TemperatureCompensatedIrradiance' THEN (IF(d.field_value1 = -1 or d.field_value1 IS NULL, "-", CONCAT_WS(" ", FORMAT(ROUND(d.field_value1, 2),2), "W/m²" ))) WHEN dg.table_name = 'model_Metter_Schneider_PM2200' AND d.field_value_default = 'Activepower' THEN (IF(d.field_value1 = -1 or d.field_value1 IS NULL, "-", CONCAT_WS(" ", FORMAT(ROUND(d.field_value1, 2),2), "kW" )))
WHEN dg.table_name = 'model_Kipp_Zonen_WS50' AND d.field_value_default = 'AirTemperature' THEN (IF(d.field_value1 = -1 or d.field_value1 IS NULL, "-", CONCAT_WS(" ", FORMAT(ROUND(d.field_value1, 2),2), "Degrees C" ))) WHEN dg.table_name = 'model_Atonometrics_RC22M' AND d.field_value_default = 'Irradiance' THEN (IF(d.field_value1 = -1 or d.field_value1 IS NULL, "-", CONCAT_WS(" ", FORMAT(ROUND(d.field_value1, 2),2), "W/m²" ))) WHEN dg.table_name = 'model_Kipp_Zonen_SMP12' AND d.field_value_default = 'RawIrradiance' THEN (IF(d.field_value1 = -1 or d.field_value1 IS NULL, "-", CONCAT_WS(" ", FORMAT(ROUND(d.field_value1, 2),2), "W/m²" )))
ELSE "Z"
END AS unit
IF(gp.name IS NULL OR gp.name = '', IF(dp.standard_name IS NULL OR dp.standard_name = '', dp.name, dp.standard_name), gp.name)

CASE s.pv_model WHEN 1 THEN IF( IFNULL(s.dc_capacity * (${irradiance} / s.global_solar_irradiance_at_stc) * (1 - (IFNULL(s.pv_module_temperature_coeff, -0.43)/100) * (s.stc_temperature - ${temperature})) * (1 - IFNULL(s.system_loss, 9)/100) * IFNULL(s.inverter_efficiency, 96)/100, 0) < s.ac_capacity, s.dc_capacity * (${irradiance} / s.global_solar_irradiance_at_stc) * (1 - (IFNULL(s.pv_module_temperature_coeff, -0.43)/100) * (s.stc_temperature - ${temperature})) * (1 - IFNULL(s.system_loss, 9)/100) * IFNULL(s.inverter_efficiency, 96)/100, s.ac_capacity ) WHEN 2 THEN IFNULL(s.dc_capacity * (${irradiance} / s.global_solar_irradiance_at_stc) * (1 - (1 + (IFNULL(s.pv_module_temperature_coeff, -0.43)/100)) * ((IF(${panelTemperature} > 0, ${panelTemperature}, ${temperature}) - s.stc_temperature)/100)) * (POW(1 - (IFNULL(s.annual_pv_module_degradation, 0.5)/100), YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - IFNULL(YEAR(s.commissioning), YEAR(s.built_since)))) * (1 - (IFNULL(s.soiling, 5)/100)) * (1 - (IFNULL(s.cable_losses, 1)/100)) * (1 - (IFNULL(s.transformer_losses, 1.5)/100)) * (1 - (IFNULL(s.other_losses, 1.5)/100)) * (IFNULL(s.inverter_efficiency, 98.5)/100), 0) WHEN 3 THEN IF( (${irradiance} >= s.min_irradiance_limit) AND (IF(${power} > (s.ac_capacity * IFNULL(s.clip, 99)/100), 1, 0) = 0), s.dc_capacity * (${irradiance} / s.global_solar_irradiance_at_stc) * (1 - IFNULL(s.pv_module_temperature_coeff, -0.37)/100 * (s.t_avg - (${temperature} + ${irradiance}/s.global_solar_irradiance_at_stc * 3))) * IFNULL(s.inverter_efficiency, 100)/100, NULL ) ELSE NULL END
( CASE s.data_send_time WHEN 3 THEN 60 WHEN 1 THEN 300 WHEN 2 THEN 900 ELSE 1 END )

(
1
MINUTE(FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( MIN(${time}) ) DIV )* , '%H:%i:%s' )) IN (0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30, 35, 40, 45, 50, 55)
MINUTE(FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( MIN(${time}) ) DIV )* , '%H:%i:%s' )) IN (0, 15, 30, 45)
MINUTE(FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( MIN(${time}) ) DIV )* , '%H:%i:%s' )) = 0
FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( MIN(${time}) ) DIV )* , '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
DATE_FORMAT(MIN(${time}), '%Y-%m-%d') = AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( MIN(${time}) ) DIV )* , '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
DAYOFMONTH(MIN(${time})) = 1 AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( MIN(${time}) ) DIV )* , '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
DAYOFYEAR(MIN(${time})) = 1 AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( MIN(${time}) ) DIV )* , '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
1
)

(
=
= AND MINUTE(FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( LEAD(MIN(${time}), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) ) DIV )* , '%H:%i:%s' )) IN (0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30, 35, 40, 45, 50, 55)
= AND MINUTE(FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( LEAD(MIN(${time}), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) ) DIV )* , '%H:%i:%s' )) IN (0, 15, 30, 45)
= AND MINUTE(FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( LEAD(MIN(${time}), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) ) DIV )* , '%H:%i:%s' )) = 0
= AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( LEAD(MIN(${time}), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) ) DIV )* , '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
= AND DATE_FORMAT(LEAD(MIN(${time}), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time), '%Y-%m-%d') = AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( LEAD(MIN(${time}), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) ) DIV )* , '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
= AND DAYOFMONTH(LEAD(MIN(${time}), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time)) = 1 AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( LEAD(MIN(${time}), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) ) DIV )* , '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
= AND DAYOFYEAR(LEAD(MIN(${time}), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time)) = 1 AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( LEAD(MIN(${time}), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) ) DIV )* , '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
1
AND
)

choose.when: CASE '${interval}' WHEN 'data_send_time' THEN 1 / 60 WHEN 'data_intervals' THEN 1 / 2 ELSE NULL END
24 * IF( ${datetime} <= DATE_SUB(#{end_date}, INTERVAL (1 + DATEDIFF(#{end_date}, #{start_date}) MOD 7) DAY), 7, 1 + DATEDIFF(#{end_date}, #{start_date}) MOD 7 )

24 * IF( DATE_FORMAT(#{end_date}, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(#{start_date}, '%Y-%m'), (1 + DATEDIFF(#{end_date}, #{start_date})), IF( ${datetime} BETWEEN #{start_date} AND LAST_DAY(#{start_date}), (1 + DATEDIFF(LAST_DAY(#{start_date}), #{start_date})), IF( ${datetime} BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(#{end_date}, '%Y-%m-01') AND #{end_date}, (1 + DATEDIFF(#{end_date}, DATE_FORMAT(#{end_date}, '%Y-%m-01'))), DAYOFMONTH(LAST_DAY(${datetime})) ) ) )

24 * IF( YEAR(#{end_date}) = YEAR(#{start_date}), (1 + DATEDIFF(#{end_date}, #{start_date})), IF( ${datetime} BETWEEN #{start_date} AND DATE_FORMAT(#{start_date}, '%Y-12-31'), (1 + DATEDIFF(DATE_FORMAT(#{start_date}, '%Y-12-31'), #{start_date})), IF( ${datetime} BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(#{end_date}, '%Y-01-01') AND #{end_date}, (1 + DATEDIFF(#{end_date}, DATE_FORMAT(#{end_date}, '%Y-01-01'))), DAYOFYEAR(DATE_FORMAT(${datetime}, '%Y-12-31')) ) ) )

mapper.sql:
IF( ( >= minimum_energy_value AND <= dc_capacity * (1 + (interval_energy_threshold / 100)) * ) OR dc_capacity = 0, ,
NULL
( SELECT SUM(IF( (energy >= minimum_energy_value AND energy <= dc_capacity * (1 + (interval_energy_threshold / 100)) * ( / 60 / 60)) OR dc_capacity = 0, energy, NULL )) FROM ( SELECT AS energy FROM ${table} dv JOIN ( SELECT CASE s.data_send_time WHEN 3 THEN
WHEN 1 THEN
WHEN 2 THEN
ELSE NULL END AS leadTimeValid, MIN(dv.time) AS minTime FROM ${table} dv WHERE dv.id_device = ${id} AND dv.time BETWEEN m.minTime AND m.maxTime GROUP BY FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) ) DIV ) * , '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i' ) ) t ON t.minTime = dv.time AND dv.id_device = ${id} ) t )
)
IF( (SUM(nvmActiveEnergy) >= minimum_energy_value AND SUM(nvmActiveEnergy) <= dc_capacity * (1 + (interval_energy_threshold / 100)) * ) OR dc_capacity = 0, SUM(nvmActiveEnergy), NULL )
IF(leadTimeValid, LEAD(${accumulatedEnergySlug}, 1) OVER (ORDER BY dv.time) - ${accumulatedEnergySlug}, NULL)
